zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie von Winzenburg於1108年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福可萊斯 阿爾福爾德文波格時，她的父親Graf Herman von Winzenburg I25歲，母親Hedwig di Istria24歲。她於1124年與Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg在德國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1160年3月25日在德國薩辛享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophie von Winzenburg于1108年出生在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福可萊斯 阿爾福爾德文波格时，她的父亲Graf Herman von Winzenburg I25岁，母亲Hedwig di Istria24岁。她于1124年与Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg在德国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1160年3月25日在德国薩辛享年52岁。

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie von Winzenburg was born in 1108, in Winzenburg, Alfeld, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, her father, Graf Herman von Winzenburg I, was 25 and her mother, Hedwig di Istria, was 24. She married Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg in 1124, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 25 March 1160, in Saxony, Germany, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie von Winzenburg est née en 1108, à Winzenburg, Kreis Alfeld, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Graf Herman von Winzenburg I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Hedwig di Istria, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg en 1124, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 mars 1160, à Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie von Winzenburg 1108 in Winzenburg, Kreis Alfeld, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Herman von Winzenburg I 25 und ihre Mutter Hedwig di Istria 24. Sie hat 1124 in Deutschland Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. März 1160 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Sachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Winzenburg è nata il nel 1108 nel Winzenburg, Kreis Alfeld, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Graf Herman von Winzenburg I, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Hedwig di Istria, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg nel 1124, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 25 marzo 1160, nel Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 52 anni.

ko.Winzenburg, Alfeld, Provinz Hannover, Pr: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 크레이스 알펠드 윈즌버그

ko.lifeSummary: Sophie von Winzenburg(이)가 1108년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 크레이스 알펠드 윈즌버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Herman von Winzenburg I(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hedwig di Istria(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1124년 독일에서 Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1160년 3월 25일 독일 작센에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Winzenburg nasceu em 1108, em Winzenburg, Kreis Alfeld, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Herman von Winzenburg I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig di Istria, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg em 1124, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de março de 1160, em Sachsen, Alemanha, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie von Winzenburg родилась в 1108 г. в местности винзенбург, крис алфелд, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Graf Herman von Winzenburg I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Hedwig di Istria, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg в 1124 г. в местности Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 25 марта 1160 г. в местности сачсен, Германия в возрасте 52 лет.

Se casó con Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg en 1124, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1160, en Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 52 años.
